pr.title: Record: Fort Knox — Legal Packed Training Cache, Zero Val Adaptation (val_bpb 0.0638, 3-seed)

output.summary: Tiny 6L/256d FP16 model blends frozen training-built packed n-gram cache with tempered logits, keeping eval stateless and legal.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training and evaluation only use the artifact; no validation-only training.
techniques: - Packed training n-gram cache serialized with FP16 weights
- Single-pass eval blending frozen cache stats and neural logits with temperature sharpening
